By clicking ‘I Agree’; I, as a student/graduate or participant, hereby give consent to the sharing and processing of my personal data stored in foreign database with only the parties whom they are allowed to access to and, the saving of my visual and audial records on Microsoft Team and/or Zoom platforms, which have servers abroad, as long as it is accessible through online meeting and to the extent that I have made my personal data (first name, family name and contact information) public:
